scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:railway: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/payroll run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.build:railway:wfconnect-timeclock: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/wfconnect-timeclock-web run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/wfconnect-timeclock-api run build
scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push && pnpm --filter @workspace/db run create-sessions-table
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
